tasks.label: Select the path of CMakePresets.json
args: const fs=require('fs');const file='${workspaceFolder}/.vscode/settings.json';const rel='${relativeFileDirname}'.replace(/\\/g,'/');let txt=fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8');const literal='$'+'{workspaceFolder}';const newPath=(rel&&rel!=='.'&&rel!=='')?literal+'/'+rel:literal;txt=txt.replace(/("cmake\.sourceDirectory"\s*:\s*)"[^"]*"/,(_,pre)=>pre+'"'+newPath+'"');fs.writeFileSync(file,txt);console.log('cmake.sourceDirectory set to:',newPath);
